Table of Contents

Interface IStatusBar

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to members that define the application statusbar.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("828100C1-CC80-11D0-8380-080009B996CC")]
public interface IStatusBar

Properties

Message[int]

The message displayed by one of the status bar panes.

string Message[int pane] { get; set; }

Parameters

pane int

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

Panes

Indicates which standard panes are shown by the status bar. Use a combination of esriStatusBarPanes constants.

int Panes { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

ProgressAnimation

The progress animation object on the statusbar.

IAnimationProgressor ProgressAnimation { get; }

Property Value

IAnimationProgressor

Examples

Sample Snippet

ProgressBar

The progress bar object on the statusbar.

IStepProgressor ProgressBar { get; }

Property Value

IStepProgressor

Examples

Sample Snippet

Visible

Indicates if the statusbar is visible.

bool Visible { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

HideProgressAnimation()

Hides the progress animation.

void HideProgressAnimation()

Examples

Sample Snippet

HideProgressBar()

Hides the progress bar.

void HideProgressBar()

Examples

Sample Snippet

PlayProgressAnimation(bool)

Plays the progress animation if the parameter is true; otherwise stops it.

void PlayProgressAnimation(bool playAnim)

Parameters

playAnim bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ShowProgressAnimation(string, string)

Makes the progress animation visible.

void ShowProgressAnimation(string Message, string animationPath)

Parameters

Message string
animationPath string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ShowProgressBar(string, int, int, int, bool)

Makes the progress bar visible.

void ShowProgressBar(string Message, int min, int max, int Step, bool onePanel)

Parameters

Message string
min int
max int
Step int
onePanel bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

StepProgressBar()

Steps the progress bar to the next position.

void StepProgressBar()
